content_body: November 2021 ~ My siblings and I came up for a short trip to your cabin. We all had so much fun relaxing by the fire and looking at the beautiful autumn leaves. The weather was perfect! The cabin is beautiful and fully stocked. All we had to do was come in and make oursleves at home. We plan on coming again with our families for a longer stay. ~ Jackson, TN
title: Autumn in Blue Ridge, GA
